expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid banding scenarios distinguish styling variants, interactions, and backward-compatible rendering outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus coverage (advisory)”, the output explicitly lists the required focus: “Modern grid banding scenarios that distinguish: 1) Styling variants … 2) Interactions … 3) Backward-compatible rendering outcomes …”. It also extracts evidence from the Jira fixture supporting those dimensions (row/column banding, color formatting, apply by header, parity with legacy Report).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output states it “cannot demonstrate Phase 4a output compliance because the required Phase 4a deliverable (`drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r<round>.md`) is not present” and concludes “Status: Blocked / Not Demonstrable.” Therefore, alignment with Phase 4a deliverable structure is not shown by the provided outputs.
